data.title: Here’s why Bitcoin’s 15% spike in Open Interest signals caution
data.description:
BTC's Open Interest increased sharply leading to a price close at $84, but this leverage driven pump signaled caution.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/heres-why-bitcoins-15-spike-in-open-interest-signals-caution/

data.title: Best Meme Coins to Buy as Fartcoin’s 300% Run Early Sign for Returning Risk-on Sentiment in Crypto
data.description:
In times when the global economy is reeling from the brunt of the ongoing Trump-inflicted trade war, there’s one asset that has outperformed everything. It’s Fartcoin ($FARTCOIN), an AI agent-based meme coin launched in October last year. $FARTCOIN has surged by more than 350% since March 10 and over 90% since just the last week. What’s more, its market capitalization now stands at a whopping $877M
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-meme-coins-to-buy-as-fartcoins-300-run-early-sign-for-returning-risk-on-sentiment-in-crypto/

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 21.4528 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 21.4528 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 20.5521 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 900,700 US dollars.

data.title: Upcoming Key Economic Events and Announcements
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, several significant events and announcements are scheduled for the upcoming week.

On Monday, U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to provide further details regarding tariffs on semiconductors.

Tuesday will feature speeches from key Federal Reserve officials. The 2026 FOMC voting member and Philadelphia Fed President, Patrick Harker, will discuss the role of the Federal Reserve. Additionally, the 2027 FOMC voting member and Atlanta Fed President, Raphael Bostic, will address monetary policy.

On Thursday, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is set to speak at the Chicago Economic Club. The same day, data on initial jobless claims for the week ending April 12 will be released.

Friday will see the New York Stock Exchange close for the day.

data.title: Michael Saylor releases Bitcoin Tracker information again, and may disclose holdings data next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), once again released information related to Bitcoin Tracker on the X platform. He said: "There are no tariffs on the orange dots." According to previous rules, MicroStrategy always discloses information about increasing its holdings of Bitcoin the day after the relevant news is released.

data.description: On Apr 13, 2025, 13:21 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 1,600 USDT and is now trading at 1,599.359985 USDT, with a narrowed 1.01% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Wayfinder Foundation Issues Security Alert on Token Claims
data.description: According to Odaily, the Wayfinder Foundation has issued a significant security alert on the X platform. The foundation emphasized that official information will only be disseminated through its official X account. Users are advised that the only legitimate methods to claim PROMPT tokens are via the foundation's app and official website. The Wayfinder Foundation cautions users against engaging with unknown links or senders for token claims and urges them to carefully verify all accessed content to ensure security.
